import io
import string
import list

fn parse_line(_ line: String) -> List<Int>
  let toks = string.split_whitespace(line)
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  for tok in toks
    match string.parse_int(tok)
    when Some(n)
      result = list.push(result, n)
    when None
      ()
    end
  end
  result
end

fn intersect(_ a: List<Int>, _ b: List<Int>) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  for x in a
    if list.contains(b, x)
      if not list.contains(result, x)
        result = list.push(result, x)
      end
    end
  end
  result
end

fn remove_value(_ xs: List<Int>, _ target: Int) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut removed = false
  for x in xs
    if removed
      result = list.push(result, x)
    else if x == target
      removed = true
    else
      result = list.push(result, x)
    end
  end
  result
end

fn sort_asc(_ xs: List<Int>) -> List<Int>
  mut remaining = xs
  mut sorted: List<Int> = []
  while remaining.len() > 0
    match list.min(remaining)
    when Some(m)
      sorted = list.push(sorted, m)
      remaining = remove_value(remaining, m)
    when None
      ()
    end
  end
  sorted
end

let line1 = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let line2 = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let a = parse_line(line1)
let b = parse_line(line2)
let inter = intersect(a, b)
let sorted = sort_asc(inter)

if sorted.len() == 0
  println("empty")
else
  mut out = ""
  mut first = true
  for x in sorted
    if first
      out = "#{x}"
      first = false
    else
      out = "#{out} #{x}"
    end
  end
  println(out)
end
